title: UNICEF: Two Aid Water Truck Drivers Killed by Israeli Fire While Delivering Water in Gaza
detail: UNICEF reported that two water truck drivers were killed by Israeli fire while delivering aid in Gaza. The killings highlight the escalating dangers faced by humanitarian workers attempting to deliver basic necessities to the civilian population amid the ongoing blockade. All land crossings have remained closed for over 37 consecutive days, severely limiting aid access and worsening famine conditions across the Gaza Strip.

media.caption: UNICEF reports two water truck drivers killed by Israeli fire while delivering aid in Gaza
